_comment: IoT MQTT Panel (Android, snr.lab.iotmqttpanel.prod) importable config for the ACCESS360 fleet. Best-effort schema: connection to 192.168.68.150:1883 (no TLS, anonymous) plus a fleet-health dashboard. Payloads are JSON, so every panel parses a field via jsonpathEnabled + jsonpath. Thresholds mirror docs/fleet-health-metrics.md (battery red < 20, RSSI red < -75). If the app rejects this import, re-create one panel by hand and re-export to capture the exact device schema, then diff against this file. See README for assumptions.

panels.name: RSSI 11251722 (WS100)
panels.comment: WS100. Flat payload. Red below -75 dBm. NOTE: one topic carries all sensors; this gauge shows the most recent RSSI regardless of Serial. To pin a single sensor use payload-Serial filtering if your app build supports it; otherwise read the value alongside the heartbeat panels.

panels.name: RSSI 11252280 (WS100)
panels.comment: WS100. Flat payload. Red below -75 dBm.

panels.name: RSSI trend (all sensors)
panels.comment: Flat payload. Live BLE signal trend across the fleet (per-message Rssi field).

panels.name: Battery 22255728 (WS300)
panels.comment: WS300. Flat payload. Battery %, red below 20%. Use the Refresh button to force a fresh reading.

panels.name: Battery 11251423 (WS200)
panels.comment: WS200. Flat payload. Battery %, red below 20%.

panels.name: Battery WS100 (proc/reading)
panels.comment: WS100 process-control sensors report Batt INSIDE proc/reading/notify (flat payload), not on dyn/batt/notify. Red below 20%.

panels.name: Temperature WS100 (proc/reading)
panels.comment: WS100 temperature, flat payload on proc/reading/notify.

panels.name: Temperature (dyn sensors)
panels.comment: Dynamic-sensor temperature, flat payload on dyn/temp/notify.

panels.name: Overall RMS (X)
panels.comment: Overall vibration RMS (X axis), flat payload on dyn/vib/notify/lite. Do NOT subscribe to dyn/vib/notify (full multipart waveform, 4G cost).

panels.name: Heartbeat (online)
panels.comment: Lights on every heartbeat = a sensor is alive. Flat payload. Online cutoff is 600 s (docs/fleet-health-metrics.md).

panels.name: Last sensor to check in
panels.comment: Shows the Serial of the most recent heartbeat. Flat payload.

panels.name: Last error
panels.comment: Last gateway error string. Flat payload {Attempt, Error}.

panels.name: Refresh battery 22255728
panels.comment: PUBLISH-only button. Sends a battery refresh request for WS300 22255728; reply lands on dyn/batt/notify within ~10 s. Safe (small JSON, no 4G waveform).
